---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect behavior in the ECL Language Server
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## ECL Expression

```ecl
<!-- The ECL expression that triggers the issue -->
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or diagnostics shown.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **VSCode version:** (e.g., 1.96)
- **Extension version:** (e.g., 1.0.0)
- **FHIR server:** (default or custom URL)

## Additional Context

Paste any relevant output from the "ECL Language Server" output channel (View > Output > select "ECL Language Server").
